initialTask.description: Optional first task to perform after boot. If omitted, the agent runs the built-in 'orient' task: read the active plan tree, summarise where the work stands, then idle waiting for outside messages.

planPath.description: Optional explicit path under docs/plans/ for the orient default to focus on. If omitted, the agent picks the highest-numbered plan folder.

idleBudgetMs.description: Idle window (ms) before self-termination. Default 30 minutes (1800000).
